rulings.Case Title: MOHSIN AHMMED VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 20, 2013, line 1: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part as follows: Sustained without leave to amend as to causes of action for (1) IIED- Plaintiff failed to allege facts re: outrageous conduct and severe emotional distress; (2) Declaratory and Injunctive relief- plaintiff failed to allege tender or applicable exception from tender. Sustained with leave to amend as to (1) NIED - to allege duty; and (2) UCL violation to allege injury in fact. Overruled as to (1) breach of contract - Plaintiff sufficiently alleged breach of "no-fee" refinance provision in three months of signing, i.e. March, 2008. 4 year Statute of limitations applies; (2) breach of covenant- defendant's demurrer does not address allegations re: written contract; (3) fraud - See allegations Sac pages, 36-37; (4) promissory estoppel - defendant does not cite any authority re: applicability of Statute of Frauds to promissory estoppel, where a promise to offer a modification is alleged. In Ruling on this Motion the Court considered the following filings (1) "Notice of Continued Hearing" filed on August 2, 2013; (2) Demurrer filed on June 27, 2013; (3) Memorandum of Points and Authorities in support of Demurrer field on June 27, 2013; (4) Request for Judicial Notice filed on June 27, 2013; (5) Notice of Errata Regarding Defendant's Demurrer filed on July 2, 2013; (5) Opposition to Demurrer filed on August 21, 2013; (6) Plaintiff's request for Judicial Notice filed on August 21, 2013; (7) Plaintiff's Objections to Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice. No Reply was filed in support of Demurrer filed on August 2, 2013. Defendant's continued disregard of the Court's Local Rules and directions given by the Court has created confusion as to bringing and calendaring of the motions. Defendant's Demurrer to the Second Amended Complaint and Motion to Strike were ordered off calendar on August 2, 2013 by the Honorable Marla J. Miller. Later on August 2, 2013, Defendant filed a "Notice of Continued Hearing" on Defendant's Demurrer. No attempt to re-file Motion to Strike was made. Defendant filed an Opposition to the purported re-calendared Demurrer on August 21, 2013. Defendant and its counsel are ordered to comply with all provisions of the Code of Civil Procedure, California Rules of Court and Local Rules of Court regarding filing, noticing and serving of the motions. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: FRANCES SUSSNA VS. PRIME OLD COUNTY LP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 20, 2013, line 2: PLAINTIFF FRANCES SUSSNA's Motion To File First Amended Complaint Granted. Plaintiff shall file First Amended Complaint no later than 9/23/2013 by 4 p.m. Trial date of October 21, 2013 is vacated. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: AMERICA PRADO GUERRERO VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 20, 2013, line 3: PLAINTIFF AMERICA GUERRERO's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: TELMATE,LLC VS. THE FRONT STREET BUILDING, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 20, 2013, line 4: DEFENDANT THE FRONT STREET BUILDING and RICK HOLMAN's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, (1) cause of action for breach of contract sufficiently alleges tenant's performance under the contract in 39; (2) cause of action for constructive eviction is available in commercial tenancies. Authorities cited by the defendant, Frittelli and Lee, do not address tort-based claims. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: JOSHUA DODD VS. LARAMAR SF URBAN APARTMENTS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Response And Further Responses To Discovery Req.'S And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 20, 2013, line 5: PLAINTIFF JOSHUA DODD's Motion For Order Compelling Response And Further Responses To Discovery Requests And For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED. No opposition filed. Defendants shall provide responses to Demand for Inspection/Production for Documents- Set Two and Special Interrogatories-Set One without objections by personal service within 5 days of Notice of Entry of Order. Defendants shall provide verified responses to Form Interrogatories- Set One, specifically to requests 12.7; 15.1; 16.1; 16.2; 16.3; 16.4; 16.5; 16.6; 16.7; 16.8; 16.9; and 16.10 by personal service within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Defendants and their counsel are ordered to pay $2,125 within 5 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND B SIMMONS VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 20, 2013, line 6: DEFENDANT AMERESCO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained without leave to amend as to causes of action for defamation and wrongful eviction. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to cause of action for emotional distress for Plaintiff to allege all elements of intentional and/or negligent infliction of emotional distress. Plaintiff's unauthorized "Second Opposition to Defendant's Demurrer" filed on August 30, 2013 is stricken. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: SHING KIT LEE et al VS. CHARLEMAGNE EVANGELISTA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Termianting, Issue Evidence Or Deemed Admission Sanctions Against Deft For Failure To Obey Court Orders Of Jul-10-13, Apr-12-13 And May-16-13, Or Further Compelling Said Deft To Comply With Said Orders; And In Any Case Compelling Deft To Pay The Reasonable Fees And Costs Of The Motion
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 20, 2013, line 7: PLAINTIFF SHING LEE and JULIE LEE's Motion For Termianting, Issue Evidence Or Deemed Admission Sanctions Against Defendant For Failure To Obey Court Orders Of Jul-10-13, Apr-12-13 And May-16-13, Or Further Compelling Said Defendant To Comply With Said Orders; And In Any Case Compelling Defendant To Pay The Reasonable Fees And Costs Of The Motion GRANTED, subject to opposition Defendant's Answer filed on August 10, 2012 is hereby stricken. Plaintiff may file a Request for Default and Default Judgment. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: MOUNIR KARDOSH VS. JOHN HAYES et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 20, 2013, line 8: DEFENDANT JOHN HAYES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend. P is ordered to clarify the discrepancy between allegations in 5 and Exhibit B of the First Amended Complaint. Plaintiff may plead alternate theories of recovery depending on which Lease is the operative agreement between parties. Defendant failed to cite any authority for the proposition that inclusion of the request to enter the premises rendered the Notice fatally defective for the purposes of supporting a cause of action for unlawful detainer. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK VS. BRYAN GRAY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 20, 2013, line 9: DEFENDANT RYAN GRAY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend to allege whether Defendant was or was not a tenant. Plaintiff and its counsel ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B in future. = (501/HMD)
